channel.title: Docker on My Awesome Site
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on My Awesome Site

item.title: Docker: A Powerful Containerization Platform (+ Lazydocker)
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Deploying software often requires bunch of resources. However, the emergence of containerization platforms such as Docker has made it more convenient and docile, yet your software works flawlessly.

item.title: Step by Step DVWA Installation for Web App Hacking
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: DVWA (Damn Vulnerable Webb Apps) is a PHP/MySQL web application that is damn vulnerable~
